The following events took place in '''24,500 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[First Great Schism]] erupted between the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Legions of Lettow]], members of the Jedi Order who seeked to use the dark side against the Order's wishes.<ref name="JvS" /> [[Xendor]], the Legions' leader, initially asked for permission to create an academy for the study of Force techniques outlawed by the Jedi, and after their refusal he founded an [[Legionnaire Academy|academy]] with his followers on [[Lettow]]<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>—prompting the Order to declare war on them. The First Great Schism came to an end with [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]<ref name="JvS" /> [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]]<ref name="Force">[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]]</ref> [[Awdrysta Pina]] killing Xendor in the [[Battle of Columus]] and stopping the heart of Xendor's lover, [[Arden Lyn]].<ref name="EGW" />

*[[First Great Schism]]
**[[Battle of Ossus (First Great Schism)|Battle of Ossus]]<ref name="EGW" />
